case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. PENSKE TRUCK LEASING

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PENSKE TRUCK LEASING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,383.36 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PENSKE TRUCK LEASING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -STAMPED SIGNATURE SERVED FEB-10-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PENSKE TRUCK LEASING

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY YASHWENDRA KUMAR--EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
